THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, ROBIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 344 ELLIS STREET #26, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E UNTIL 11:59PM ON 7-15-96; NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL RETURN DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT AS PROVIDED BY LAW. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN ATNYS FEES & COSTS.
